clip_start: Start time for video/audio clips, e.g. "1:30" (m:ss) or "90" (seconds)
orbit_horizontal: horizontal rotation in degrees (0 = front. 90 = from the right. -90 = from the left)
orbit_vertical: vertical rotation in degrees (0 = front. 90 = from the top. -90 = from the bottom)
orbit_zoom: (1.0 = bounding sphere fills the view. 2.0 = twice as close)
center_x: rotation center x (0 = center, in model units)
center_y: rotation center y (0 = center, in model units)
center_z: rotation center z (0 = center, in model units)
alt_text: Describe what is visible in this view for screen readers. If empty, the object's image description is used.
question: Heading for this step
layer1_content: Panel content: write text here, paste markdown, or enter path to .md file (e.g. your-story/file.md)
layer2_content: Second panel: write text here, paste markdown, or enter path to .md file
